I design products for complex, regulated environments. Eighteen years in product, fifteen in design — senior UX judgment, enterprise compliance documentation, AI as leverage, not costume.

Founder · product & design
0 → 1.0 MVP in 40 days: 346 commits, 21 SQL migrations, 31 components, an edge function with cron, a 17-part design-system migration across 5 recursive review rounds (78.4 → 95.6).

Product Manager · UX/UI Designer
